parameters.jsCode:
// Topic queue — edit this list anytime. Pick a random unused topic.
const topics = [
  'How Las Vegas Law Firms Use AI to Qualify Leads 24/7',
  'Why Every Dental Office in Vegas Needs an AI Receptionist',
  'AI Workflows That Save Contractors 10 Hours a Week',
  'How Auto Repair Shops Use AI to Follow Up With Customers',
  'The 5 N8N Workflows Every Small Business Should Run',
  'AI Chatbots vs Hiring: What Vegas Businesses Should Know',
  'How to Automate Google Reviews With N8N',
  'Lead Scoring With AI: A Practical Guide for Local Businesses',
  'Why Your Website Needs an AI Layer in 2026',
  'The Real Cost of NOT Automating Your Small Business',
  "Cold Email Automation That Doesn't Feel Like Spam",
  'How Restaurants in Las Vegas Use AI for Reservations',
  'AI Commercial Production: Broadcast Quality in Days, Not Weeks',
  'Custom AI Dashboards: What They Are and Why They Win',
  'How to Hire a Digital Employee (AI Agents Explained)'
];

const topic = topics[Math.floor(Math.random() * topics.length)];
return [{ json: { topic } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={ "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 4000, "system": "You are a content writer for Jaybird Automations, an AI agency in Las Vegas, NV. You write practical, specific blog posts for small business owners — no hype, no fluff, no buzzwords like 'revolutionary' or 'game-changing'. Professional but conversational tone, like a smart friend explaining something. You ALWAYS return valid JSON only — no markdown fences, no preamble.", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": "Write a blog post about: {{ $json.topic }} Requirements: - 800-1200 words - Reference Las Vegas local context where it fits naturally - Use

for main sections,

for subsections - Include at least 1 numbered list (
    ) and 1 bulleted list (
      ) - End the body with a paragraph CTA linking to /#contact - Mention real tools when relevant (N8N, Claude, Supabase, Cloudflare, etc.) Return ONLY a valid JSON object matching this exact schema (no markdown, no code fences): { "title": "60-70 char SEO title", "slug": "kebab-case-slug-max-60-chars", "meta_description": "150-160 char SEO meta description", "excerpt": "2-sentence teaser for the blog index", "body_html": "

      ...

      ...

      ... (no , , or tags, just the inner content)", "tags": ["ai", "las-vegas", "automation"] }" } ] }
